43.gl: to bear young; causatively, to beget; medically, to act as midwife; specifically, to show lineage

43.gl: Elasah, the name of four Israelites
43.dv: from H410 (אֵל) and H6213 (עָשָׂה); God has made;

43.gl: Rephajah, the name of five Israelites
43.dv: from H7495 (רָפָא) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has cured;

43.gl: Atsel, the name of an Israelite, and of a place in Palestine

44.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
44.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

44.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
44.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

44.gl: six (as an overplus  beyond five or the fingers of the hand); as ord. sixth
44.dv: masculine שִׁשָּׁה; a primitive number; compare H7797 (שׂוּשׂ)

44.kj: an-(the) other; one sort, so, some, such, them, these (same), they, this, those, thus, which, who(-m).

44.gl: Obadjah, the name of thirteen Israelites
44.dv: or עֹבַדְיָהוּ; active participle of H5647 (עָבַד) and H3050 (יָהּ); serving Jah;

44.gl: Jishmael, the name of Abraham's oldest son, and of five Israelites
44.dv: from H8085 (שָׁמַע) and H410 (אֵל); God will hear;
